title: Business Owners Town Hall
location: Forest Avenue BID Office, 1247 Forest Ave (2nd Floor)
summary: An open forum for Forest Avenue business owners to discuss district priorities, proposed programs, and upcoming BID initiatives. All property and business owners welcome.
body:
The Forest Avenue BID hosts quarterly town halls where business owners, property owners, and community stakeholders can share feedback, ask questions, and shape the direction of BID programming.

This meeting will cover:
- 2025 beautification plan update
- Summer Street Fair logistics and vendor registration
- Façade improvement program: application window opening
- Small business grant opportunities from NYC Small Business Services
- Q&A with the BID Executive Director and Board Chair

Refreshments provided. The meeting is open to all—you do not need to be a BID member to attend and speak. We welcome all voices from the Forest Avenue community.
